title: Handling Opt Out of Services Usage Data request
content:
Handling Opt Out of Services Usage Data request

The Support team doesn’t have the ability to opt the customer out of Services Usage Data and the customer cannot opt-out of the feature without Sales team approval as mentioned in the handbook . To handle this request, you can

Find the Account owner on SFDC

Use the Zendesk Macro Support::Self-Managed::Super Sonics Opt Out and fill in the account information
headings: Handling Opt Out of Services Usage Data request
